pull.title: ci, iwyu: Fix warnings in `src/script` and treat them as errors
pull.body:
This PR [continues](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/33725#issuecomment-3466897433) the ongoing effort to enforce IWYU warnings.

See [Developer Notes](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/blob/master/doc/developer-notes.md#using-iwyu).

events.body: The following sections might be updated with supplementary metadata relevant to reviewers and maintainers. ### Code Coverage & Benchmarks For details see: https://corecheck.dev/bitcoin/bitcoin/pulls/35011. ### Reviews See [the guideline](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#code-review) for information on the review process. | Type | Reviewers | | ---- | --------- | | Concept ACK | [kevkevinpal](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/35011#issuecomment-4193509176) | | Stale ACK | [hebasto](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/35011#pullrequestreview-4242015184), [maflcko](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/35011#issuecomment-4488559873) | If your review is incorrectly listed, please copy-paste <!--meta-tag:bot-skip--> into the comment that the bot should ignore. ### Conflicts Reviewers, this pull request conflicts with the following ones: * [#35287](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/35287) (script: render BIP-388 wallet policies in getdescriptorinfo by rxbryan) * [#34995](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34995) (ci, iwyu: Fix warnings in `src/common` and treat them as errors by hebasto) * [#34806](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34806) (refactor: logging: Various API improvements by ajtowns) * [#34566](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34566) (feature: Use different datadirs for different signets by ekzyis) * [#33966](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/33966) (refactor: disentangle miner startup defaults from runtime options by Sjors) * [#33741](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/33741) (rpc: Optionally print feerates in sat/vb by polespinasa) * [#32729](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/32729) (test,refactor: extract script template helpers & widen sigop count coverage by l0rinc) If you consider this pull request important, please also help to review the conflicting pull requests. Ideally, start with the one that should be merged first.

Concept ACK.

d41095a70d87e84b8c5cdfcefe1c53174fbabac6

Per our [policy](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/blob/master/doc/developer-notes.md#using-iwyu), "a comment explaining the rationale is required for every use of `IWYU pragma: export`":

```bash
$ git grep -l "IWYU pragma: export" -- src/script
src/script/interpreter.h
src/script/script.h
```

Concept ACK

Looks like `common/ compat/ support/` are now left from that list after this PR is merged

@kevkevinpal from the list I only think only `compat/ and support/` are left there is already a [PR: 34995](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34995) for `common/` -> https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34995. I don't know if this will be done for `QT` https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/33725#issuecomment-3462543390

rename.from: ci, iwyu: Fix warnings in src/script and treat them as errors
rename.to: ci, iwyu: Fix warnings in 'src/script' and treat them as errors

rename.from: ci, iwyu: Fix warnings in 'src/script' and treat them as errors
rename.to: ci, iwyu: Fix warnings in `src/script` and treat them as errors

events.body:
> I don't know if this will be done for `QT` [#33725 (comment)](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/33725#issuecomment-3462543390)

It will be, though it requires some preliminary work.

> Per our [policy](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/blob/master/doc/developer-notes.md#using-iwyu), "a comment explaining the rationale is required for every use of `IWYU pragma: export`":

updated the PR to include comments for the left `IWYU pragma: export` on `scr/script`

Almost ACK.

There is a silent merge conflict here. Please apply the following patch during your next rebase to resolve it:
```
--- a/src/script/sigcache.h
+++ b/src/script/sigcache.h
@@ -11,7 +11,9 @@
 #include <cuckoocache.h>
 #include <script/interpreter.h>
 #include <uint256.h>
-#include <util/byte_units.h>
+// IWYU incorrectly suggests removing this header.
+// See https://github.com/include-what-you-use/include-what-you-use/issues/2014.
+#include <util/byte_units.h> // IWYU pragma: keep
 #include <util/hasher.h>
 
 #include <cstddef>
```

See also: https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/35152#pullrequestreview-4179389612.

<!--85328a0da195eb286784d51f73fa0af9-->
🚧 At least one of the CI tasks failed.
<sub>Task `tidy`: https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/actions/runs/25481226241/job/76755161377</sub>
<sub>LLM reason (✨ experimental): CI failed due to a C++ build error: `psbt.h` references an undeclared identifier `MUSIG2_PUBNONCE_SIZE` (in `external_signer.cpp`).</sub>

<details><summary>Hints</summary>

Try to run the tests locally, according to the documentation. However, a CI failure may still
happen due to a number of reasons, for example:

* Possibly due to a silent merge conflict (the changes in this pull request being
incompatible with the current code in the target branch). If so, make sure to rebase on the latest
commit of the target branch.

* A sanitizer issue, which can only be found by compiling with the sanitizer and running the
  affected test.

* An intermittent issue.

Leave a comment here, if you need help tracking down a confusing failure.

</details>

lgtm, but this needs rebase.

review ACK 74f42e9dd7c5683209d5d366486e1a6def49dcf1 👐

```

RUTRmVTMeKV5npGrKx1nqXCw5zeVHdtdYURB/KlyA/LMFgpNCs+SkW9a8N95d+U4AP1RJMi+krxU1A3Yux4bpwZNLvVBKy0wLgM=
trusted comment: review ACK 74f42e9dd7c5683209d5d366486e1a6def49dcf1 👐
ywT1ie3Iu2etfEO07i9/qcxxU+AIr1i/F6m05pazBU4LNgC2ub9u2OUXrXwhNBtS1yDpSJlLi7bRHig12EKeCA==
```

</details>

> lgtm, but this needs rebase.

Right. There is a silent merge conflict, at least with https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34225.

@hebasto Do you want to pick this up, and rebase it? Otherwise, this will sit around longer and get more stale over time. I think we should try to reduce the number of open iwyu pull request to at most one, and focus on merging each one after review. Dragging them over months through rebases isn't going to make them better.

events.message:
ci, iwyu: Fix warnings in src/scripts and treat them as error

Add explicit #include "musig.h" in psbt.h to fix
MUSIG2_PUBNONCE_SIZE after IWYU cleanups.
iwyu: remove #include <coins.h> from src/script/sign.h as recommended by iwyu

comments.diff_hunk:
@@ -209,7 +209,7 @@ fi
 
 if [[ "${RUN_IWYU}" == true ]]; then
   # TODO: Consider enforcing IWYU across the entire codebase.
-  FILES_WITH_ENFORCED_IWYU="/src/(((crypto|index|kernel|primitives|univalue/(lib|test)|util|zmq)/.*|common/license_info|node/blockstorage|node/utxo_snapshot|clientversion|core_io|signet)\\.cpp)"
+  FILES_WITH_ENFORCED_IWYU="/src/(((crypto|index|kernel|primitives|univalue/(lib|test)|util|zmq|script)/.*|common/license_info|node/blockstorage|node/utxo_snapshot|clientversion|core_io|signet)\\.cpp)"
comments.body: nit: Could the subdirectories be lexicographically ordered?
Separate header groups by an empty line?

I see this explanation stems from faf1fb207fb6e9a12c864074f8c40d5922d93ff4, but saving a line feels like a [weak](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34639#discussion_r2864519204) rationale here. Let's stick to the ones that are documented in the Developer Notes or update them if needed.

cc @maflcko

This comment stems from fa5ccc4137fdd14a75a6fc860b8ff6fc455cb55d. I have the same concerns as [above](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/35011#discussion_r3072805878).

cc @maflcko
nit: Separate groups by an empty line?
